pages.title: Mobile Supply Node
pages.text: Equip it in the $(bold)belt slot$() to scan nearby incubators every 5 seconds. The default area is a cube extending 3 blocks horizontally and vertically from the player.$(br2)The belt consumes materials from the player's inventory, never from chests or nearby containers.

pages.title: Default Supply Rules
pages.text: $(li)N below 50: Biochemical Solution → N +25.$(br)$(li)P below 50: Purified Water Bottle → P +20.$(br)$(li)D below 25: Silicon Shard → D +15.$(br2)Each low channel on each incubator consumes one item. A missing material skips only its own channel and never blocks the others.

pages.title: Bottles & Config
pages.text: Using purified water returns a glass bottle. If the inventory is full, the bottle drops beside the player.$(br2)The scan range, three thresholds, and injection amounts are configurable. Scan range has a hard cap of 5 blocks. Channels at or above their thresholds consume nothing.

pages.title: Chest Sources
pages.text: Each matching chest has a 20% chance to gain one belt:$(br2)$(li)Abandoned mineshaft$(br)$(li)Stronghold corridor, crossing, or library$(br)$(li)Big underwater ruin$(br2)The belt has no crafting recipe and must be found while exploring.
